hero.title: Plumbing problems fixed properly, the first time
hero.subtitle: We repair leaks, install boilers, and maintain heating systems across Novi Sad. You get a clear price before we start and a tidy job when we leave.

highlights.title: Emergency repairs
highlights.description: Burst pipes and leaks handled quickly.

highlights.title: Boiler installation
highlights.description: Supply, fitting, and first service included.

highlights.title: Annual maintenance
highlights.description: Keep your heating reliable through winter.

contactCard.title: Request a callback
contactCard.subtitle: Tell us what you need and we'll call you back the same day.

services.title: What we do
services.subtitle: Straightforward services for homes and small commercial spaces.

items.title: Leak & pipe repair
items.description: Locating and fixing leaks in kitchens, bathrooms, and mains connections, with minimal disruption to walls and floors.

items.title: Boiler installation
items.description: Supply and installation of gas and electric boilers, including removal of the old unit and a full safety check.

items.title: Bathroom plumbing
items.description: Complete plumbing for bathroom renovations: pipework, fixtures, radiators, and connection to existing systems.

items.title: Heating maintenance
items.description: Annual servicing of boilers and radiators so small issues get caught before the heating season.

items.title: Drain cleaning
items.description: Mechanical and high-pressure cleaning of blocked drains, with a camera inspection when the cause isn't obvious.

items.title: Water heater service
items.description: Repair and replacement of electric water heaters, including descaling and heating element replacement.

about.title: A family business since 1998
about.subtitle: Two generations of plumbers, one standard of work.
about.body: Kovac & Sons started as a one-man workshop in Petrovaradin. Today we're a team of five, but the way we work hasn't changed: we show up when we say we will, we explain what needs to be done and what it costs, and we don't leave until the job is tested and the workspace is clean. Most of our new clients come from recommendations, and we intend to keep it that way.
about.imageAlt: The Kovac & Sons team in front of their workshop

features.title: Why people call us back
features.subtitle: The small things that make working with us easy.

items.title: Fixed quotes
items.description: You approve the price before we start. No surprises on the invoice.

items.title: On-time arrival
items.description: We give you a two-hour window and call if anything changes.

items.title: Clean workspace
items.description: Floors covered, tools packed, waste taken away when we finish.

items.title: Warranty on work
items.description: Two years on labour, manufacturer warranty on all parts.

items.title: Quality parts
items.description: We install brands we're willing to come back and service.

items.title: Honest advice
items.description: If a repair makes more sense than a replacement, we'll say so.

pricing.title: Simple pricing
pricing.subtitle: Standard call-out rates. Larger jobs are quoted individually, in writing.

features: Fee waived if you book the repair

plans.name: Renovation plumbing

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.subtitle: If your question isn't here, call us — we answer the phone.

items.question: How quickly can you come out?
items.answer: For emergencies like burst pipes or major leaks, usually within a few hours. For regular repairs and installations, we can typically book you within the same week.

items.question: Do you give quotes before starting work?
items.answer: Always. For repairs, you get a fixed quote after diagnosis and nothing happens until you approve it. For renovations, you get an itemised written offer.

items.question: Is your work guaranteed?
items.answer: Yes. We give two years of warranty on our labour, and all parts we install carry the manufacturer's warranty. If something we fixed fails, we come back free of charge.

items.question: Which areas do you cover?
items.answer: Novi Sad and surrounding towns: Petrovaradin, Sremska Kamenica, Futog, Veternik, and Kać. For larger projects we also travel further — just ask.

items.question: How do I pay?
items.answer: Cash, bank transfer, or card on site. For renovation projects we agree on payment stages in the written offer, with nothing due up front except materials.

cta.title: Have a plumbing problem?
cta.subtitle: Call us or send a message. We'll give you an honest assessment and a clear price.

contact.title: Get in touch
contact.subtitle: Call, write, or drop by the workshop. We reply to messages within one working day.

footer.description: Family-run plumbing and heating service in Novi Sad since 1998.
